hero.title: Excellence in Corporate Governance
hero.description: Exemplary governance based on integrity, transparency and accountability to ensure stakeholder trust.

principles.title: Governance Principles
principles.description: Our governance is based on four fundamental pillars that guide every decision and action within the institution.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Clear and regular communication with all stakeholders

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: Adherence to the highest ethical standards in all our decisions

accountability.title: Accountability
accountability.description: Clear commitment to shareholders, customers and employees

board.title: Board of Directors
board.description: Our board of directors brings together recognized experts to ensure strategic vision and independent supervision.

jean_louis.name: Jean-Louis Dubois
jean_louis.background: Former CEO of BNP Paribas, 35 years of experience in investment banking

marie.name: Marie Schmidt
marie.background: Former CEO of Deutsche Bank, expert in international markets

klaus.name: Dr. Klaus Weber
klaus.background: Emeritus Professor of Finance, former ECB advisor

sophie.name: Sophie Laurent
sophie.background: Former CFO of LVMH, governance specialist

committees.title: Specialized Committees
committees.description: Our specialized committees provide in-depth supervision in their respective areas of expertise.

strategic.name: Strategic Committee
strategic.role: Defines strategic vision and major orientations

audit.name: Audit Committee
audit.role: Supervises the reliability of financial information and internal control

risk.name: Risk Committee
risk.role: Evaluates and supervises financial and operational risks

nomination.name: Nomination Committee
nomination.role: Proposes nominations for key positions and evaluates directors

esg.name: ESG Committee
esg.role: Defines social and environmental responsibility policy

ethics_compliance.title: Ethics and Compliance
ethics_compliance.description: Our commitment to business ethics and regulatory compliance is at the heart of our corporate culture.

cta.title: Excellence in Governance
cta.description: Our exemplary governance ensures the sustainability of our institution and the trust of all stakeholders.
